TestCase z8Change(TestCase t1) {
    TestCase follow_case = t1;
    // --- Memory handling code generated based on the rule ---
    int* follow_case_list = (int*)malloc(t1.n * sizeof(int));
    memcpy(follow_case_list, t1.list, t1.n * sizeof(int));
    follow_case.list = follow_case_list;
    // ------------------------------------
    
    // Defensive code: ensure there is at least one element
    if (follow_case.n == 0) {
        return follow_case;
    }
    
    // Operation: set element at random index to INT_MAX when element < INT_MAX
    int random_index = rand() % follow_case.n;
    if (follow_case.list[random_index] < INT_MAX) {
        follow_case.list[random_index] = INT_MAX;
    }
    
    return follow_case;
}
